_comment: Editable shim. Extends ./invariants/tsconfig.base.json (HUMAN-OWNED) for the architectural flags, then adds app-specific settings here. The meta-invariant (apps/tests/invariants/test_webui_invariants_wired.py) runs `tsc --showConfig` against this file and asserts every flag in KNOWN_SENTINELS matches the protected base — so overriding strict flags here will trip the test.
